acceptance_results.criterion: Admin bootstrap no longer uses SentryErrorHandler as a DI class provider.
acceptance_results.reason: The ErrorHandler provider now uses Sentry.createErrorHandler(), avoiding Angular resolution of Sentry's internal errorHandlerOptions token.
Production build and app TypeScript compilation passed.

acceptance_results.criterion: Admin dev-server startup smoke passes on a free port.
acceptance_results.reason: Dev server started on port 4422 and headless Chrome output had no NullInjectorError, errorHandlerOptions, SentryErrorHandler, or main.ts error match.

cleanup_notes: Dev-server smoke pid/log artifacts were removed after verification.
No long-running webspa-admin process on port 4421 remains.
completed_work: Replaced the Sentry ErrorHandler class provider with Sentry.createErrorHandler().
Disabled external font CSS inlining for production builds so Angular does not need network access to fetch Google Fonts.
Verified the dev runtime path that produced the reported injector error.
operator_message: TMP-060 fixes the reported NullInjectorError in webspa-admin startup.
risk_notes: No Sentry dependency, lockfile, backend service, admin feature module, or production deployment file changed.
summary: Fixed the webspa-admin startup crash by registering Sentry's Angular error handler through createErrorHandler instead of using SentryErrorHandler as an Angular DI class provider.

validation.output_excerpt: assignment_decision allow; no blocking or review reasons

validation.command: make WEBSPA_ADMIN_PORT=4422 dev-admin plus headless Chrome dump-dom scan
validation.output_excerpt: Admin Panel started on port 4422; no NullInjectorError/errorHandlerOptions/SentryErrorHandler/main.ts match.
